rsi.key_finding: RSI > 87 → +20pp at +7d; deep oversold bounces short-term then reverses at +14d
rsi.notes: rsi_divergence_7_14 shows strong mean-reversion: fast >> slow → -15pp at +3d, fast << slow → +13pp at +3d

williams_r.key_finding: Extreme overbought → +15pp at +14d; wr_spread_7_14 mirrors RSI divergence pattern
williams_r.notes: Signal character similar to RSI; moderate incremental value

roc.key_finding: ROC_7 > 0.11 → +10pp at +7d; roc_spread_5_14 catch-up gap → +8pp at +7d
roc.notes: Clean momentum continuation; extreme large moves reverse at +3d then resume at +14d

stoch.key_finding: Results mirror WR/RSI — mathematically similar concept
stoch.notes: No incremental value over RSI or Williams %R

macd.key_finding: Extreme negative histogram → +11pp at +3d; extreme positive MACD → reversal -12pp
macd.notes: Dual character: moderate MACD = continuation, extreme MACD = reversal

ma.key_finding: Price > 130% above 200MA → -26pp at +14d; near-high extension consistently bullish at shorter periods
ma.notes: ma_cross_50_200 extreme golden cross → -24pp at +14d; late bull market warning

volatility.notes: vol_ratio_7_21 < 0.40 also strong; high vol > 63 consistently bearish at +14d

volume.notes: Short-horizon signal only — edge fades significantly by +14d

drawdown.key_finding: Extreme recovery ratio (0.43+) → +18pp at +14d; near 30d high → +5-8pp at +7/14d
drawdown.notes: Signals are real but require extreme conditions to trigger

dxy.key_finding: DXY +3% over 20d → -15pp BTC at +7d; DXY below 50MA → +3-6pp BTC at +14d
dxy.notes: Shorter DXY lookbacks (1d, 5d) too noisy; 20d return is the only reliable signal

on_chain.notes: Strongest absolute edge in entire universe; adr_act_ma_ratio spike → +12-18pp; hash rate below MA → -16pp at +3d

cycle.key_finding: Phase 0-0.05 (0-7 weeks post-halving) → -13pp at +7d; phase 0.15-0.40 (4-18 months post-halving) → +11pp at +14d
cycle.notes: Best used as a regime overlay to condition other signals, not as standalone
